title: Click Inventory
description: Click on Shulkerboxes, Crafting Tables, Ender Chests and more in your inventory
body:
Fed up with placing blocks every time you want to craft something or find your netherite hoe?

Simply right‑click items directly in your Inventory, Ender Chest, or any container to interact with them instantly.

Compatible with Crafting Tables, Shulker Boxes, Ender Chests, Cartography Tables, Grindstones, Looms and Stonecutters
